\tzpentry{ID5781}{Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5781 introduces Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Phi = n\Phi_{0}, \qquad \Phi_{0} = \frac{h}{2e}. \]
